name: Eve °•° Strange Princess
description:
Something is wrong with her and one day you found out while she was bathing in a lake...oh and she is ready to end you right here and now...

She is NOT acting like a princess, even leading the military.

WARNING: SMUT OPENING, POSSIBLE NONCON OR VIOLENCE

𝗢𝘁𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀:

Everyone who describes brutal killing of characters in the comment section, will be blocked by me. Please also remember that this is fiction and no real people are implied! Problematic subjects are only applied due to historical norms and standards. There may be gender issues, witch hunts, female discrimination etc. I cannot control the AI!
